description_long: This is a stylized chibi doll with a large head and small body, standing on a round, decorated base featuring concentric circles and geometric patterns in purple, gold, and black. The doll has light brown, side-parted hair that is voluminous and smooth, with a single lock falling over the right side of the face. Its face is characterized by large, expressive blue eyes, a small mouth, and subtle blush marks on the cheeks, giving it a cute and friendly appearance. The doll is dressed in a white robe with blue and purple accents, a wide blue sash, and a skirt adorned with floral motifs, reminiscent of traditional Japanese or fantasy mage attire. In its right hand, the doll holds an ornate golden staff with a blue shaft and intricate filigree at the top, suggesting a magical or fantasy theme. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with vibrant colors and clean lines, making it visually appealing and suitable as a collectible or decorative item.
description: A chibi-style doll with light brown hair, large blue eyes, and a white and blue robe, holding a golden staff and standing on a decorated round base.
description_view_0: The doll is seen from the back-left, highlighting the voluminous brown hair and the detailed base design, with the staff partially visible.
description_view_1: The front view shows the doll's expressive face, blue eyes, ornate staff, and detailed robe with floral patterns and a blue sash.
description_view_2: The back-right view emphasizes the smooth flow of the hair and the staff's golden filigree, with the base's geometric pattern visible.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the back of the head and hair, with the base's full circular design clearly visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Fantasy mage-inspired outfit with a white robe, blue and purple accents, a wide blue sash, and a skirt featuring floral motifs, reminiscent of traditional Japanese or RPG character attire.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both feet on the base, head facing forward, right arm extended forward holding a staff, left arm relaxed at the side, and torso straight.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with large, open blue eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a small, content mouth with subtle blush marks on the cheeks.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, smooth, light brown hair with a side part and a single lock falling over the right side of the face, voluminous and rounded at the back.
